zh.Belvedere, London, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭倫敦貝爾維德
zh.Maine, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Franc: 法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adrian de Lucy於1064年9月出生在法國諾門迪奧內盧瑟時，他的父親Richard de Lucy II24歲，母親Roesia de Lucy34歲。他於1084年與Aveline Goth在法國諾門迪奧內盧瑟結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1179年7月14日在法國諾門迪享年114歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adrian de Lucy于1064年9月出生在法国諾門迪奧內盧瑟时，他的父亲Richard de Lucy II24岁，母亲Roesia de Lucy34岁。他于1084年与Aveline Goth在法国諾門迪奧內盧瑟结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1179年7月14日在法国諾門迪享年114岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Adrian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of the Latin name Hadrianus ‘man from Hadria’. Hadria was a town in northern Italy, which gave its name to the Adriatic Sea; it is of unknown derivation. The initial H- has always been very volatile. The name was borne by the Roman emperor Publius Aelius Hadrianus , during whose reign ( ad 117–138 ) Hadrian's Wall was built across northern England. The name was later taken by several early popes, including the only English pope, Nicholas Breakspeare (Adrian IV). It was in early use among immigrants from the Low Countries, and is found in some English regions from the mid-16th century. It has enjoyed considerable popularity in the English-speaking world since the late 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Adrian de Lucy was born in September 1064, in Lucé, Orne, Normandy, France, his father, Richard de Lucy II, was 24 and his mother, Roesia de Lucy, was 34. He married Aveline Goth in 1084, in Lucé, Orne, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 14 July 1179, in Normandy, France, at the age of 114.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adrian de Lucy est né en septembre 1064, à Lucé, Orne, Normandie, France, son père, Richard de Lucy II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Roesia de Lucy, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Aveline Goth en 1084, à Lucé, Orne, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 14 juillet 1179, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 114 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adrian de Lucy im September 1064 in Lucé, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Lucy II 24 und seine Mutter Roesia de Lucy 34. Er hat 1084 in Lucé, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich Aveline Goth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Juli 1179 im Alter von 114 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adrian de Lucy è nato il nel settembre 1064 nel Lucé, Orne, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Richard de Lucy II, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Roesia de Lucy, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Aveline Goth nel 1084, nel Lucé, Orne, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 luglio 1179, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 114 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adrian de Lucyが1064年9月にフランスノーマンディオルンルクeで生まれた時，父Richard de Lucy IIは24歳，母Roesia de Lucyは34歳であった。1084年にフランスノーマンディオルンルクeでAveline Gothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1179年7月14日にフランスノーマンディで114歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adrian de Lucy(이)가 1064년 9월 프랑스 노먼디 른 뤼ce에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Lucy II(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Roesia de Lucy(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1084년 프랑스 노먼디 른 뤼ce에서 Aveline Goth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1179년 7월 14일 프랑스 노먼디에서 114세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adrian de Lucy nasceu em setembro de 1064, em Lucé, Orne, Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard de Lucy II, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Roesia de Lucy, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Aveline Goth em 1084, em Lucé, Orne, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de julho de 1179, em Normandie, França, com 114 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adrian de Lucy родился сентябрь 1064 г. в местности лукe, орн, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Richard de Lucy II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Roesia de Lucy, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Aveline Goth в 1084 г. в местности лукe, орн, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 14 июля 1179 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 114 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adrian de Lucy nació en septiembre de 1064, en Lucé, Orne, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Richard de Lucy II, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Roesia de Lucy, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Aveline Goth en 1084, en Lucé, Orne, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de julio de 1179, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 114 años.
